results.evidence_standard_met_reason: The image clearly shows the rear bumper and allows assessment of surface deformation.
results.claim_status_justification: A visible dent is present on the rear bumper, confirming the claim.
results.user_claim: Customer: Hi, I found new damage on my car after it was parked outside overnight. | Support: Sorry to hear that. Can you describe what changed? | Customer: The back of the car has a dent now. It was not there before. | Support: Did anything else break or is it mostly body damage? | Customer: Mostly the rear bumper area. I attached the photo I took this morning.

results.evidence_standard_met_reason: Images clearly show the front bumper and allow assessment of damage.
results.claim_status_justification: Images depict damage exceeding a simple scratch; significant scratching, deformation, and a puncture/hole are visible on the front bumper.
results.user_claim: Customer: Parking lot mein meri car ko scrape lag gaya. | Support: Aap kis type ka damage report karna chahte hain? | Customer: Front side par mark aa gaya hai, bumper ke upar. | Support: Light damage hai ya body par scratch? | Customer: Light theek hai, front bumper par scratch hai. Photos upload kar diye hain.

results.evidence_standard_met_reason: Clear visual evidence of windshield crack.
results.claim_status_justification: Image img_1 displays a spider-web crack, supporting the stone strike claim.
results.user_claim: Customer: I am opening a claim for my windshield. | Support: What happened? | Customer: A small stone hit it while I was driving and now there is a crack spreading from that spot. | Support: Is the car otherwise okay? | Customer: Yes, this is only about the front glass. I added the pictures I have.

results.evidence_standard_met_reason: The image clearly shows the claimed object and provides a view sufficient to inspect for broken parts.
results.claim_status_justification: The image shows a side mirror with shattered glass, supporting the claim of a broken part.
results.user_claim: Customer: Someone clipped my car while it was parked. | Support: What part was hit? | Customer: The side mirror got damaged. It is not sitting the way it should anymore. | Support: Was there any damage to the door too? | Customer: I did not notice anything else major, just the mirror.

results.evidence_standard_met_reason: Clear images show rear bumper deformation.
results.claim_status_justification: Image img_1 shows a clear dent and deformation on the rear bumper area, consistent with being tapped from behind.
results.user_claim: Customer: I want to file this as bumper damage. | Support: Can you tell me what happened? | Customer: The car was tapped from behind and now the back looks damaged. | Support: Are you asking for review of the rear side? | Customer: Yes, the back bumper. It looks pretty bad to me, so I uploaded both photos.

results.evidence_standard_met_reason: No images were provided for analysis.
results.claim_status_justification: The visual judge determined that no images were provided, and the quality judge requested image uploads. Therefore, a definitive claim status cannot be determined.
results.user_claim: Customer: Hi, I am not fully sure how to explain this because I noticed it only after reaching home. | Support: No problem, please tell me what happened. | Customer: There was a small bump earlier, nothing major, and I first thought everything was fine. Later I looked at the car again because my family member said the front area looked different. | Support: Are you reporting a general vehicle issue or a specific damaged part? | Customer: I was confused at first because I checked the side and the front and walked around the car a few times. I do not want to claim the wrong thing. | Support: That is okay. What part do you want reviewed? | Customer: After checking again, I think the issue is with the headlight. It looks like the headlight may be cracked, so please review that part.

results.evidence_standard_met_reason: Image img_2 provides a clear view of the dent.
results.claim_status_justification: Image img_2 shows a dent on the car door panel.
results.user_claim: Customer: There is a dent along the side of my car. | Support: When did you notice it? | Customer: This morning, after the car had been parked near the gate. | Support: Is it near the front or back? | Customer: It is on the door panel area. I attached two photos from different distances.

results.evidence_standard_met_reason: The image allows inspection of the hood's surface condition.
results.claim_status_justification: The image shows extensive damage, including severe scratching and paint loss on the hood, supporting a claim of damage beyond a simple scratch.
results.user_claim: Customer: I picked up my car after service and noticed a mark on the hood. | Support: What kind of mark is it? | Customer: It looks like a scratch across the top panel. | Support: Do you think it happened during service? | Customer: Yes, that is why I am asking for review. The photo is attached.

results.evidence_standard_met_reason: The image clearly shows a cracked laptop screen.
results.claim_status_justification: The image shows radiating cracks across the laptop screen, consistent with a fall.
results.user_claim: Customer: My laptop fell from the table yesterday. | Support: Is it turning on? | Customer: It turns on, but the display glass has a crack now. | Support: Are you reporting the screen only or the whole laptop? | Customer: The screen is the issue. I attached a photo of it open.

results.evidence_standard_met_reason: Images show clear damage to the hinge area.
results.claim_status_justification: Image img_1 clearly shows physical damage to the laptop hinge and bezel, supporting the claim of a broken part causing screen wobble.
results.user_claim: Customer: The laptop no longer opens smoothly. | Support: What seems to be wrong mechanically? | Customer: The hinge area has broken and the screen wobbles. | Support: Did this happen after a drop? | Customer: Yes, it slipped from the sofa. I uploaded photos from the outside and side.

results.evidence_standard_met_reason: Image shows water damage on keyboard.
results.claim_status_justification: Image shows liquid droplets and puddles on the keyboard, confirming water spill.
results.user_claim: Customer: I spilled water near my laptop while working. | Support: What part was affected? | Customer: It went over the keys and left a stain. Some keys feel sticky now. | Support: Is the display damaged too? | Customer: No, this is about the keyboard area only.

results.evidence_standard_met_reason: Images show the laptop and dented corner.
results.claim_status_justification: Image img_2 clearly shows a dent on the laptop corner, supporting the claim.
results.user_claim: Customer: My laptop bag fell from a chair and hit the floor. | Support: What damage did you notice? | Customer: One corner of the laptop has a dent now. | Support: Does the laptop still work? | Customer: It works, but the outer corner is damaged. I added two photos.

results.evidence_standard_met_reason: Image shows clear shattered screen.
results.claim_status_justification: Image shows a shattered glass screen with a central impact point and radiating cracks, supporting the claim of glass shatter.
results.user_claim: Customer: I am not sure if this should be a repair claim or a replacement claim, so I wanted to ask first. | Support: We can help. What device is this about? | Customer: It is my laptop. I carry it every day, and yesterday my bag got pressed between two seats during travel. At first I thought the laptop was okay because it still opened. | Support: What changed after that? | Customer: Later, while using it, I noticed marks on the display area. I restarted it twice because I thought it might just be something on the screen, but it still bothered me. | Support: Are you reporting keyboard, hinge, body, or screen damage? | Customer: Not the keyboard or hinge. The issue I want checked is the screen. It looks shattered to me, so I am submitting this as screen damage.

results.evidence_standard_met_reason: Insufficient images; only one image was provided, failing the multi-image requirement. No image of the trackpad itself was provided.
results.claim_status_justification: The visual evidence is insufficient to verify the claimed physical damage. No images focusing on the trackpad area were provided, and only a single image was submitted overall.
results.user_claim: Customer: The laptop trackpad has stopped working properly. | Support: Did anything happen before it stopped working? | Customer: The front area hit the desk edge when I moved it. | Support: Are you reporting internal function or physical damage? | Customer: Physical damage around the trackpad area. I attached the photo for review.

results.evidence_standard_met_reason: No visual evidence provided to assess the crushed package corner.
results.claim_status_justification: The visual judge determined there was no image to evaluate the claim. The quality judge requested images. Therefore, a determination cannot be made.
results.user_claim: Customer: My delivery box arrived damaged. | Support: What part of the package was affected? | Customer: One corner was crushed in when I received it. | Support: Is the item inside part of this claim? | Customer: Not right now. I am reporting the package corner damage.

results.evidence_standard_met_reason: Images show clear damage to the package seal.
results.claim_status_justification: Image img_1 depicts a clear tear in the package seal, supporting the claim of compromised packaging.
results.user_claim: Customer: Package receive hua toh opened jaisa lag raha tha. | Support: Tape broken tha ya box crush hua tha? | Customer: Seal wali side phati hui thi, jaise parcel khola gaya ho. | Support: Kya andar ka item missing hai? | Customer: Abhi item missing claim nahi kar raha, sirf torn packaging review karwana hai.

results.evidence_standard_met_reason: Image shows a visible stain on the package exterior.
results.claim_status_justification: The image displays a dark, wet-looking stain on the package surface, supporting the water damage claim despite image quality concerns.
results.user_claim: Customer: I received a package that looks water damaged. | Support: Was the item inside wet too? | Customer: I have not opened everything yet, but the outside has a wet-looking stain. | Support: So the claim is about the package condition? | Customer: Yes, the package surface looked damaged when it arrived.

results.evidence_standard_met_reason: Image shows opened package & packing materials.
results.claim_status_justification: Image shows opened package with packing material, but doesn't show the ordered item to confirm if anything is missing.
results.user_claim: Customer: The item I ordered was not inside the box. | Support: Did the package look opened when you received it? | Customer: I checked it after delivery and could not find the product inside. | Support: What are you asking us to verify? | Customer: Please verify that the contents are missing from the package.

results.evidence_standard_met_reason: Image shows contents, not the exterior shipping box.
results.claim_status_justification: The image shows cans, not the shipping box, preventing assessment of crushing.
results.user_claim: Customer: The shipping box arrived in bad condition. | Support: What kind of condition issue are you reporting? | Customer: It looked badly crushed when it was delivered. | Support: Is the claim about the outside box or the product inside? | Customer: The outside box. I want the crushed box reviewed.

results.evidence_standard_met_reason: Images show a tear in the packaging and seal.
results.claim_status_justification: Image img_1 shows a clear tear in the cardboard packaging that has ripped through the tamper-evident seal, confirming the seal was torn upon delivery.
results.user_claim: Customer: My delivery box arrived opened. | Support: Was the package crushed or was the seal affected? | Customer: The seal area looked torn when I received it. | Support: Are you asking us to review the package condition or the item inside? | Customer: The package condition. I want the torn-open package reviewed.
